mapper.select: SELECT * FROM medicine WHERE medicine_code = #{medicineCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM medicine
AND (medicine_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR medicine_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND status = 1
ORDER BY medicine_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medicine (medicine_code, medicine_name, medicine_spec, package_unit, manufacturer, price, stock, dosage_form, usage_method, dosage, status) VALUES (#{medicineCode}, #{medicineName}, #{medicineSpec}, #{packageUnit}, #{manufacturer}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{dosageForm}, #{usageMethod}, #{dosage}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE medicine SET stock = stock + #{quantity} WHERE medicine_id = #{medicineId}
mapper.delete: UPDATE medicine SET status = 0 WHERE medicine_id = #{medicineId}
